title: T-019 — UI: FIN-003a WO Costs List page (fin_wo_list, §8.4)
prompt:
# T-019 — FIN-003a WO Costs List UI

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.4 FIN-003a [UNIVERSAL]; §11.5 V-FIN-VAR-01..04 color coding.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/wo-screens.jsx:1-122` (`fin_wo_list`)

## Goal
Server Component page `/finance/wos` rendering shadcn DataTable of `work_order_costs` rows, with status tabs, variance filter, VarBadge color-coded, D365 journal ref link, row click → detail page.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/wo-screens.jsx:1-122`.
shadcn primitives: Table, TableHeader, TableRow, TableCell, Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, Input, Select, Button, Badge.
Parity checklist:
1. Status tabs (All / Open / Closed / Posted) with counts via single GROUP BY query.
2. Variance Filter Select (All / Favorable / Unfavorable / >5% / >10%) bound to URL via nuqs.
3. Other filters: search Input, date-range DatePicker, cost-center Select, production-line Select.
4. DataTable columns: WO Number (Link → `/finance/wos/[woId]/cost`), Product, Production Line, Cost Center, Status badge (WoCostStatusBadge: open=amber, closed=blue, posted=green), Total Cost Actual GBP (mono), Total Variance (VarBadge: >10%=destructive, >5%=warning, ≤5%=secondary), Variance %, D365 Journal Ref (Link → `/finance/d365?tab=batches&journal=<ref>` when posted), Costing Date.
5. Empty state: shadcn EmptyState pattern (centered icon + heading + clear-filters CTA).
6. Export CSV CTA opens MODAL-10 (deferred to T-032 — Button renders 'Coming soon' tooltip in P1 placeholder, OR if T-032 lands first, wires directly).
7. RBAC: visible to `fin.wo_cost.view` holders.

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/wos/page.tsx` — RSC fetches filtered page + counts.
2. `app/finance/wos/_components/wo-list-table.tsx` — TanStack DataTable client.
3. Shared `app/finance/_components/wo-cost-status-badge.tsx` + `var-badge.tsx` (used here and FIN-003 detail).

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/wos/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/wos/_components/wo-list-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/wo-cost-status-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/var-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/wos/_components/__tests__/wo-list-table.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given the page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/wo-screens.jsx:1-122, then 4 status tabs + 5 filter controls + 10 columns + EmptyState match — RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
- Given URL ?status=closed, when page renders, then DataTable shows only status='closed' and 'Closed' tab active. AND given URL ?variance=fav, when page renders, then DataTable shows only rows with total_variance < 0.
- Given row with total_variance > 12%, when rendered, then VarBadge variant is 'destructive' per V-FIN-VAR-02. AND given row with status='posted' and d365_journal_id non-null, when D365 Journal Ref rendered, then it is a clickable Link.
- Given user clicks a row, when navigation finishes, then URL is /finance/wos/<woId>/cost. AND given user without fin.wo_cost.view, when page renders, then forbidden page returned.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 8→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: wo-list-table.test.tsx asserts parity + URL params + VarBadge variants + D365 link + row click navigation + RBAC.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/wos`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use HTML `<select>` instead of shadcn Select.
- Do not skip nuqs URL state — filters must be shareable.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe).
- Do not show D365 link when posted_to_d365_at IS NULL.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.

pipeline_inputs.description: FIN-003a WO Costs List page matching fin_wo_list prototype with status tabs, variance filter, color-coded VarBadge, and D365 journal link.
pipeline_inputs.details: Shared WoCostStatusBadge + VarBadge extracted under app/finance/_components for reuse in FIN-003 detail (T-020) and FIN-001 dashboard (T-031). URL-first filter state via nuqs. [AC count consolidated from 8→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]
